slides.headline: An insulation installer we work with couldn't keep up with grant season.
slides.body: When the grants land, the phone melts. Swipe.

slides.headline: Most callers were window-shopping.
slides.body: Or didn't qualify. Each one a 15-minute chat he didn't have time for.

slides.headline: And the ready-to-go customers slipped through.
slides.body: Lost in a pile of 'just wondering' calls.

slides.headline: We set up a system that qualifies every enquiry up front.
slides.body: Checks the eligibility basics, books the real ones, politely filters the rest.

slides.headline: He fits insulation all day — instead of answering the same questions on repeat.
Grant season burying you?
slides.save: Save this before the next grant rush
